title: Comment on: Short pulse width widens the therapeutic window of subthalamic neurostimulation
journal_name: Annals of Clinical and Translational Neurology
study_question: Does charge-per-pulse analysis alter therapeutic window interpretation in subthalamic neurostimulation?
population_assessed: Extracted data from Reich et al patients with subthalamic neurostimulation
outcome_measures: charge per pulse, rigidity control, muscle contraction threshold, therapeutic window
inclusion_criteria: Data reported by Reich et al across 20-120 microsecond pulses
answer_to_study_question: Charge-based reanalysis suggests wider pulses produce a larger therapeutic window.
